description: MCP server for DEVONthink 4 — outcome-oriented tools, preview-then-apply, audit + undo.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint not provided and registryType='mcpb' not in the inference table)

name: io.github.istefox/dt-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to skip recursive record_count when listing databases. Useful for databases with tens of thousands of records where the first call would otherwise take several seconds.
environmentVariables.name: ISTEFOX_FAST_LIST_DATABASES

environmentVariables.description: Override TTL in seconds for preview_token returned by file_document/bulk_apply dry_run (default 300, range 1-3600).
environmentVariables.name: ISTEFOX_PREVIEW_TTL_S

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to enable embedded ChromaDB vector retrieval for ask_database and search (mode=hybrid). EXPERIMENTAL in 0.1.0; embedding model not yet benchmarked cross-corpus (see ADR-008).
environmentVariables.name: ISTEFOX_RAG_ENABLED

environmentVariables.description: sentence-transformers model name used by the RAG provider. Default paraphrase-multilingual-MiniLM-L12-v2 (~120MB). Override examples: BAAI/bge-m3 (~2.2GB).
environmentVariables.name: ISTEFOX_RAG_MODEL

title: DEVONthink MCP (istefox)
